metadata.title: Context Reuse Simulator Results
metadata.subtitle: DualPath-Inspired Context Reuse Scheduling for The Librarian
metadata.honesty: Exploratory research only. No production cache behavior. No GPU/RDMA/KV acceleration claims.

workload_assumptions.shape: many turns, large reused history, short appends
workload_assumptions.bottleneck: context movement / retrieval / reuse, not raw model speed
